days.title: Arrival in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Welcome to the neon-lit capital

timeline.title: Arrive at Haneda Airport
timeline.detail: Flight arrival at Tokyo's Haneda Airport Terminal. Collect luggage and proceed through immigration and customs.

timeline.title: Train to Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Take the Haneda Express (HEX) train directly to Shinjuku Station, experiencing Tokyo's famous rail system. Journey takes approximately 30 minutes.

timeline.title: Hotel Check-in
timeline.detail: Arrive at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South and complete group check-in. Store luggage and freshen up after travel.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Welcome Lunch at Ippudo Ramen
timeline.detail: Team lunch at a popular ramen restaurant in Shinjuku. Try authentic Tokyo-style ramen and experience local food culture.

timeline.title: Explore Shinjuku District
timeline.detail: Walking tour of Shinjuku's bustling streets, neon signs, and historic landmarks. Perfect for photography with the team.

timeline.title: Visit Meiji Shrine
timeline.detail: Guided visit to this historic Shinto shrine surrounded by forest. Learn about Tokyo's cultural and spiritual heritage.

timeline.title: Team Photo Session at Omotesando
timeline.detail: Stroll through Omotesando's upscale shopping district, capture team photos with iconic backdrops and modern architecture.

timeline.title: Dinner at Izakaya Tsuruhashi
timeline.detail: Traditional Japanese izakaya experience with team bonding. Enjoy yakitori, sashimi, and sake in a lively atmosphere.

timeline.title: Nightlife at Memory Lane (Omoide Yokocho)
timeline.detail: Explore the nostalgic narrow alley of small bars and restaurants in Shinjuku. Optional group drinks and local encounters.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel & Rest
timeline.detail: Walk back to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South. Early night to recover from travel and prepare for Day 2 adventures.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

localTips: Get Suica card at airport for unlimited train travel

days.title: Shibuya & Shinjuku Exploration
days.subtitle: Electric energy and neon nights

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Hotel buffet breakfast at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South. Energize before a full day of exploration.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Travel to Meiji Shrine
timeline.detail: Take JR Yamanote Line from Shinjuku Station to Harajuku Station (15 minutes). Walk through Omotesando forest path to Meiji Shrine.

timeline.title: Meiji Shrine Visit & Photography
timeline.detail: Explore the serene Shinto shrine surrounded by forest. Capture beautiful torii gates and peaceful grounds. Group photo opportunity at the main shrine.
timeline.mapQuery: Meiji Shrine, 1-1 Yoyogi Kamizonocho, Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Omotesando Shopping Street
timeline.detail: Stroll through Tokyo's most upscale shopping district. Browse high-end boutiques and cafes while enjoying architectural photography.

timeline.title: Lunch near Harajuku
timeline.detail: Team lunch at a ramen or tonkatsu restaurant in Harajuku. Local favorite serving authentic Japanese comfort food.

timeline.title: Travel to Shibuya Crossing
timeline.detail: Take train from Harajuku to Shibuya Station (5 minutes). Walk to famous Shibuya Crossing intersection.

timeline.title: Shibuya Crossing Experience
timeline.detail: Experience the world's busiest pedestrian crossing. Capture iconic photos from Starbucks overlook and experience the electric energy of Shibuya.

timeline.title: Shibuya Street Exploration
timeline.detail: Explore Center Gai pedestrian street, Shibuya 109 shopping center, and surrounding neighborhoods. Photography of neon signs and urban landscapes.

timeline.title: Return to Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Take JR Yamanote Line back to Shinjuku Station (15 minutes). Rest at hotel before evening activities.

timeline.title: Shinjuku Neon Walk & Photography
timeline.detail: Evening stroll through vibrant Shinjuku neon district. Capture illuminated signs, street scenes, and Tokyo's electric nightlife atmosphere.

timeline.title: Team Dinner in Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Group celebration dinner at premium izakaya or kaiseki restaurant in Shinjuku. Enjoy fine Japanese cuisine and team bonding.

timeline.title: Karaoke or Nightlife
timeline.detail: Optional karaoke session or visit to a quiet bar/lounge in Shinjuku. Wind down the evening with team activities.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Head back to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South for rest. Prepare for Day 3 adventures.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

localTips: Visit Shibuya Crossing at dusk for best photography

days.title: Historical Tokyo & Asakusa
days.subtitle: Ancient temples and traditional culture

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy a Japanese and Western breakfast buffet at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South before heading out for the day.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Train to Asakusa
timeline.detail: Take the Tokyo Metro Marunouchi Line from Shinjuku Station to Tawaramachi Station (about 20 minutes). Convenient and authentic Tokyo transit experience.
timeline.mapQuery: Shinjuku Station to Tawaramachi Station, Tokyo Metro, Japan

timeline.title: Senso-ji Temple Visit
timeline.detail: Explore Tokyo's oldest temple dating back to 645 AD. Walk through the iconic Thunder Gate, browse souvenir stalls, and experience traditional Buddhist architecture and spiritual atmosphere.

timeline.title: Nakamise Shopping Street
timeline.detail: Stroll through the historic shopping arcade with 89 traditional shops selling souvenirs, snacks, crafts, and traditional Japanese goods. Perfect for photography and finding unique gifts.

timeline.title: Lunch - Traditional Tempura
timeline.detail: Enjoy authentic tempura at a local restaurant near Asakusa. Try shrimp tempura, vegetable tempura, and tempura rice bowl specialties.

timeline.title: Team Activity - Traditional Craft Workshop
timeline.detail: Participate in a 90-minute traditional Japanese craft workshop (pottery, calligraphy, or indigo dyeing). All 6 team members create personalized souvenirs and learn from local artisans.
timeline.mapQuery: Traditional craft workshop, Asakusa, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Sumida River Walk & Photography
timeline.detail: Take a scenic walk along the Sumida River banks with views of historic bridges, traditional buildings, and photo opportunities. Capture the essence of old Tokyo.

timeline.title: Return Train to Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Take Tokyo Metro Ginza Line or Tawaramachi Station back to Shinjuku Station (about 25 minutes). Relax and prepare for evening activities.
timeline.mapQuery: Tawaramachi Station to Shinjuku Station, Tokyo Metro, Japan

timeline.title: Dinner - Izakaya Experience
timeline.detail: Enjoy team dinner at a traditional izakaya in Shinjuku with Japanese grilled skewers, sake, beer, and local dishes. Perfect for team bonding and relaxation.

timeline.title: Nightlife - Karaoke or Bar
timeline.detail: Visit a local karaoke bar or cocktail lounge in Shinjuku for team entertainment. Popular nightlife district with numerous venues catering to groups.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel & Rest
timeline.detail: Head back to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South (5-minute walk from Shinjuku Station). Wind down the evening and prepare for Day 4.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

localTips: Arrive early to avoid crowds at temple

days.title: Modern Tokyo & Team Activity
days.subtitle: Innovation meets tradition

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Wake up and enjoy buffet breakfast at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South before heading out for the day.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Travel to TeamLab Borderless
timeline.detail: Take the JR Yamanote Line from Shinjuku to Ariake Station, then walk or short taxi ride to TeamLab Borderless entrance.

timeline.title: TeamLab Borderless Digital Art Experience
timeline.detail: Immerse your team in interactive digital art installations spanning multiple rooms with light, sound, and movement. Book timed entry in advance for 6 people.

timeline.title: Lunch near Ariake
timeline.detail: Enjoy lunch at a local ramen or tempura restaurant near Ariake, convenient before heading to Roppongi.

timeline.title: Travel to Roppongi Hills
timeline.detail: Take the Rinkai Line from Ariake to Harajuku Station, then transfer to Tokyo Metro Chiyoda Line to Roppongi Station.

timeline.title: Roppongi Hills Exploration & Photography
timeline.detail: Walk through the modern architecture of Roppongi Hills, visit the Mori Art Museum or explore shopping areas. Great photo opportunities with Tokyo's skyline.

timeline.title: Tokyo Tower Visit & Team Activity
timeline.detail: Travel to Tokyo Tower for group photo session and observation deck views. Organize a team scavenger hunt or photo challenge for team bonding.

timeline.title: Dinner in Roppongi
timeline.detail: Return to Roppongi for team dinner at a high-quality restaurant. Options include yakitori, kaiseki, or contemporary Japanese cuisine with group seating.

timeline.title: Nightlife in Roppongi
timeline.detail: Experience Roppongi's nightlife with team visits to bars, karaoke, or lounges. Good for team bonding and relaxation after a full day.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Take Tokyo Metro Hibiya Line or taxi back to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South for rest after an eventful day.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

localTips: Go in evening for best experience

days.title: Food Tour & Culinary Exploration
days.subtitle: Flavors of Japan - sushi to ramen

timeline.title: Wake up & Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy hotel breakfast buffet at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South before heading out for the food tour day.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Train to Tsukiji
timeline.detail: Take the Ginza Line or walk via Shinjuku station to reach Tsukiji Outer Market. Journey takes about 20-30 minutes.

timeline.title: Tsukiji Outer Market Tour
timeline.detail: Guided tour through Japan's famous seafood and produce market. Sample fresh sushi ingredients, street snacks, and learn about market culture from a local guide.
timeline.mapQuery: Tsukiji Outer Market, Chuo Ward, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Sushi Making Class
timeline.detail: Hands-on sushi rolling class with a professional chef. Learn nigiri and maki techniques, then enjoy the sushi you've made with team members.
timeline.mapQuery: Tsukiji Sushi Cooking Class, Chuo Ward, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Lunch - Fresh Market Sushi
timeline.detail: Lunch at a highly-rated sushi restaurant near Tsukiji featuring fresh daily catches and omakase experience.

timeline.title: Michelin Street Food Tour
timeline.detail: Walking food tour sampling award-winning street food stalls and small eateries with Michelin recognition. Includes ramen, tempura, and regional specialties.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel & Rest
timeline.detail: Head back to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South via train to freshen up and rest before evening activities.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Team Gathering at Hotel Lobby
timeline.detail: Meet in the hotel lobby to brief the group on the evening izakaya crawl route and group logistics.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Izakaya Crawl - First Stop
timeline.detail: Visit a traditional izakaya in Shinjuku with yakitori, gyoza, and sake. Casual Japanese pub atmosphere perfect for team bonding.

timeline.title: Izakaya Crawl - Second Stop
timeline.detail: Move to another local favorite izakaya for more authentic Japanese pub food, drinks, and team karaoke or games.

timeline.title: Night Photography Walk
timeline.detail: Stroll through Shinjuku's vibrant neon-lit streets for nightlife photography. Capture iconic signage and bustling night scenes around Shibuya-dori.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel & Wind Down
timeline.detail: Return to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South. Enjoy hotel amenities or rest in rooms. End of Day 5.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

localTips: Tsukiji market best in early morning

days.title: Day Trip to Mount Fuji Area
days.subtitle: Nature and iconic views

timeline.title: Hotel Checkout & Breakfast
timeline.detail: Wake up and have breakfast at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South before heading to Mount Fuji area. Pack light with cameras ready for photography.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Depart for Hakone
timeline.detail: Take the Odakyu Electric Railway limited express train from Shinjuku Station to Hakone-Yumoto Station (approximately 1.5 hours). Scenic views begin during the journey.
timeline.mapQuery: Shinjuku Station to Hakone-Yumoto, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Hakone Open-Air Museum
timeline.detail: Explore this unique museum with sculptures and modern art set against beautiful mountain scenery and Mount Fuji views. Great for team photos and cultural appreciation.

timeline.title: Lunch at Local Hakone Restaurant
timeline.detail: Enjoy traditional Japanese cuisine or local specialties at a restaurant in Hakone town. Try local tofu or fresh mountain vegetables.

timeline.title: Lake Ashi Scenic Viewing
timeline.detail: Visit the shores of Lake Ashi (Ashinoko) for stunning reflections of Mount Fuji on clear days. Walk along the scenic promenade and take team photos at the iconic torii gates view.

timeline.title: Hakone Ropeway Cable Car Experience
timeline.detail: Ride the scenic Hakone Ropeway over volcanic valley with Mount Fuji views. The cable car offers unique photography opportunities and mountain vistas.

timeline.title: Traditional Hot Spring (Onsen) Experience
timeline.detail: Visit a public or hotel onsen in Hakone for an authentic hot spring bath experience. Relax as a team before heading back to Tokyo.
timeline.mapQuery: Hakone onsen public bath, Hakone, Japan

timeline.title: Dinner in Hakone
timeline.detail: Enjoy a traditional kaiseki dinner or tempura restaurant with local specialties and sake. Celebrate the day's adventures together.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel in Tokyo
timeline.detail: Take the Odakyu express train back to Shinjuku Station (approximately 1.5 hours). Rest and prepare for final days of the trip.
timeline.mapQuery: Hakone-Yumoto to Shinjuku Station, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Arrive Hotel & Rest
timeline.detail: Arrive back at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South. Review photos from the day, hydrate, and get good rest for remaining trip days.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

localTips: Take train early from Tokyo Station

days.title: Departure from Tokyo
days.subtitle: Farewell and final memories

timeline.title: Wake up and breakfast
timeline.detail: Early breakfast at Hotel Gracery to fuel up before checkout. Enjoy final Japanese breakfast with the team.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Hotel checkout
timeline.detail: Complete checkout process, store luggage at hotel concierge, confirm departure arrangements with group.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Last-minute souvenir shopping
timeline.detail: Visit Shinjuku's department stores and local shops for final gifts and souvenirs. Browse duty-free options and regional specialties.

timeline.title: Explore Meiji Shrine area
timeline.detail: Quick visit to nearby Meiji Shrine and Omotesando for last memorable walk and final photos of Tokyo's serene and bustling contrasts.

timeline.title: Team farewell lunch
timeline.detail: Gather for a special farewell meal at a highly-rated Japanese restaurant. Share memories and celebrate the company trip with good food and camaraderie.

timeline.title: Retrieve luggage and head to station
timeline.detail: Return to Hotel Gracery to collect all luggage. Take Shinjuku Station for seamless train connection to Haneda Airport.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Express train to Haneda Airport
timeline.detail: Ride the Narita Express or Keikyu Line from Shinjuku Station directly to Haneda Airport Terminal with the full group (approximately 30 minutes).
timeline.mapQuery: Shinjuku Station, Tokyo, Japan to Haneda Airport, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Haneda Airport arrival and check-in
timeline.detail: Arrive at Haneda Terminal, complete group check-in at the departure counter, collect boarding passes, and go through security.

timeline.title: Airport lounge and final shopping
timeline.detail: Relax in airport lounge or duty-free shops. Grab final snacks, drinks, or last-minute gifts before boarding.

timeline.title: Departure flight from Haneda
timeline.detail: Board flight and depart Tokyo. The company trip concludes with final farewells at the gate as travelers head home with lasting memories.

localTips: Get gifts at Depachika food halls

hotels.name: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku South
hotels.note: 5-min walk from Shinjuku Station, heart of entertainment district

budget.note: Budget: RM 2,400 per person round-trip, return flights
¥500 per person for JR Suica card
¥5,000 per person per day (mix of casual to upscale)
Hakone day tour transport, optional hot spring hotel if overnight

urgent.label: Book TeamLab Borderless tickets
urgent.note: Very popular, book 2+ weeks in advance

urgent.label: Arrange group dinner reservations
urgent.note: At least 2 Michelin-recommended restaurants for team meals

urgent.label: Confirm Mount Fuji day trip logistics
urgent.note: Book transport passes or guided tour
